title: Veil (disambiguation)
content:
'''Veil''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[The Veil (Planet X)|Veil]]''', the turbulent [[atmosphere]] of [[Planet X]]
*The '''[[Veil speeder]]''', a [[Jedi]] [[speeder bike]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[The Veil/Legends|The Veil]]''' in the [[Farstey sector/Legends|Farstey sector]]
*The '''[[Veil Nebula/Legends|Veil Nebula]]''' in the [[D'Astan sector/Legends|D'Astan sector]]
*The '''[[Spangled Veil Nebula/Legends|Spangled Veil Nebula]]''' in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]]
*'''[[Shindra's Veil]]''' in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]
*'''[[The Veil (Nar Shaddaa)|The Veil]]''', a trio of [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]]

{{Disambig}}
